summary: v3 (TattooMatch → TatScope rebrand + PWA + ProfilePicturePicker + 9:16 vertical media + Discover layout rewrite) — all backend regression (32/32) and all targeted frontend checks pass. PWA manifest/SW/meta verified. Discover layout matches spec: filter-action-btn replaces message button, top desc-toggle, hashtags, bottom artist row with name/username/location/Takip Et, image aspectRatio 9/16. Profile pic upload via file (NOT URL) confirmed for both user (SettingsDialog → Profil tab) and artist (StudioEditor → Studio Bilgileri dialog). Studio dashboard portfolio uses 9/16 thumbs.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py still references the old name 'TattooMatch' in the module docstring (line 1) and the startup log message (~line 1011). Cosmetic only — does not impact behavior, but should be renamed for consistency with /api/ root name='TatScope' and FastAPI title='TatScope API'.

test_backend_v2.py requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var to be set externally (no default + no fallback), unlike test_backend.py which has the same constraint. Be sure to export before pytest runs (CI/test runner should source frontend/.env).
PWAInstallPrompt only fires on beforeinstallprompt — won't fire in headless Chromium; verified component file & SW registration in index.js instead per request.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created; reused TEST_-prefixed fixtures from previous iterations via test_backend.py + test_backend_v2.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3 iteration verified end-to-end. PWA: manifest.json valid (name=TatScope, display=standalone, 4 icons), service-worker.js HTTP 200, registered (navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations returned 1 active reg, scope=/), index.html title='TatScope · Dövme Keşfi', meta theme-color=#09090b, link rel=manifest=/manifest.json, apple-touch-icon=/icon.png. Discover (logged in as demo): filter-action-btn present, ZERO message-action buttons (removed as required), desc-toggle-*, artist-name-* ('Mert Özkan'), follow-btn-* ('Takip Et'), aspectRatio 9/16 detected, hashtags visible, FilterPopup opens reliably (no longer the v2 intermittency). 9:16 vertical aspect verified on: Discover, ArtistProfile (9/16), Studio Dashboard portfolio (3x '9/16'). FollowingFeed/Moodboard returned aspectRatio='none' only because demo user has no follows/saves (empty state), but source code confirms style={aspectRatio:'9 / 16'} on tile wrappers. ProfilePicturePicker confirmed on SettingsDialog→Profil tab (Demo user) AND StudioEditor→Studio Bilgileri dialog (Deniz artist) — file input (accept=image/*) with 'Fotoğraf Yükle'/'Değiştir'/'Kaldır' controls, NO URL input. To rerun: cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v.
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iteration's intermittent FilterPopup/SettingsDialog issue did NOT reproduce in v3 — both popups opened reliably on first click. No code changes were needed; either the welcome-toast timing/z-index has been adjusted or the additional 2.5s warm-up wait in my script accounted for it. Only single test failure (test_root_health expecting 'TattooMatch') was a stale assertion in the test suite from the rebrand — fixed in place by updating expected name to 'TatScope'.
